shadcn-html / list

Made from: CSS

List

Styled unordered and ordered lists with support for icon-prefixed items. Built on native <ul> and <ol> elements.

Component Specification — components/list/list.md

Native basis

<ul> and <ol> elements with styled list items. Supports icon-prefixed items.

Web Platform APIs

<ul> <ol> <li>

Variants (data-variant)

defaultStandard bullet/number list iconIcon-prefixed items, no bullets noneNo markers, clean layout

Accessibility

• Lists convey structure to screen readers automatically

• Use <ul> for unordered content, <ol> for sequential/ranked content

Unordered List

Standard bulleted list.

  • First item in the list
  • Second item with more detail
  • Third item to complete the set
<ul class="list">
  <li class="list-item">First item</li>
  <li class="list-item">Second item</li>
  <li class="list-item">Third item</li>
</ul>

Ordered List

Numbered sequential list.

  1. Clone the repository
  2. Install dependencies
  3. Start the development server
<ol class="list">
  <li class="list-item">Clone the repository</li>
  <li class="list-item">Install dependencies</li>
  <li class="list-item">Start the development server</li>
</ol>

Icon List

Items prefixed with icons instead of bullets.

  • Unlimited projects
  • Priority support
  • Custom analytics 
<ul class="list" data-variant="icon">
  <li class="list-item">
    <svg>...</svg>
    <span>Unlimited projects</span>
  </li>
</ul>

No Markers

Clean list without any bullet or number markers.

  • Dashboard
  • Settings
  • Profile
<ul class="list" data-variant="none">
  <li class="list-item">Dashboard</li>
  <li class="list-item">Settings</li>
  <li class="list-item">Profile</li>
</ul>

User List

List composed with .avatar, .badge, and .card for a team member pattern.
